items.title_en: Samsung hits $1 trillion valuation as AI rally lifts shares over 10%
items.title_zh: 人工智能涨势带动三星股价上涨逾 10%，三星估值突破 1 万亿美元
items.desc_en: The rally comes after the company reported an over eightfold increase in first-quarter operating profits last week.
items.desc_zh: 在该公司上周公布第一季度营业利润增长逾八倍之后，股价出现上涨。

items.title_en: In the global AI race, a sanctioned Chinese firm says cheaper models can still win
items.title_zh: 在全球人工智能竞赛中，一家受制裁的中国公司表示，更便宜的模型仍然可以获胜
items.desc_en: As China’s AI competition intensifies, SenseTime is shifting toward multimodal AI, lower-cost models and overseas expansion to remain competitive, co-founder Lin Dahua said.
items.desc_zh: 联合创始人林大华表示，随着中国人工智能竞争的加剧，商汤科技正在转向多模态人工智能、低成本模式和海外扩张，以保持竞争力。

items.title_en: 2 dead, 3 injured after shooting at Carrollton Koreatown shopping center; suspect in custody, police say - CBS News
items.title_zh: 卡罗尔顿韩国城购物中心发生枪击事件，造成2人死亡、3人受伤；警方称嫌疑人已被拘留 - 哥伦比亚广播公司新闻

items.title_en: Oil prices fall as Trump pauses Hormuz escort effort
items.title_zh: 特朗普暂停霍尔木兹护航行动，油价下跌
items.desc_en: Oil prices fell after Trump said the U.S. would pause its naval escort endeavor in the Strait of Hormuz, raising hopes of a potential deal with Iran.
items.desc_zh: 在特朗普表示美国将暂停在霍尔木兹海峡的海军护航行动后，油价下跌，这增加了与伊朗达成潜在协议的希望。

items.title_en: Apple to pay $250m to iPhone buyers over AI features lawsuit
items.title_zh: 苹果因 AI 功能诉讼向 iPhone 买家支付 2.5 亿美元
items.desc_en: Claims from last year said the tech firm’s advertising of Apple Intelligence fooled iPhone buyers.
items.desc_zh: 去年的指控称，这家科技公司的 Apple Intelligence 广告欺骗了 iPhone 买家。

items.desc_zh: 他在竞选的大部分时间里批评该州对民主党候选人领导的Covid-19大流行的反应。

items.title_en: Bitcoin treasury firm Strategy breaks from 'never sell' approach to the flagship crypto
items.title_zh: 比特币财务公司Strategy打破了对旗舰加密货币“永不出售”的态度
items.desc_en: Strategy is shifting from passive bitcoin accumulation to actively managing balance sheet to boost bitcoin per share value.
items.desc_zh: 策略正在从被动积累比特币转向主动管理资产负债表，以提高比特币每股价值。

items.title_en: Trump pauses U.S. bid to guide ships out of Strait of Hormuz, cites Iran deal progress
items.title_zh: 特朗普暂停美国引导船只离开霍尔木兹海峡的努力，援引伊朗协议进展
items.desc_en: President Donald Trump said he is pausing "Project Freedom," the U.S. military's bid to guide commercial ships out of the Strait of Hormuz.
items.desc_zh: 唐纳德·特朗普总统表示，他正在暂停美国军方引导商船驶出霍尔木兹海峡的“自由计划”。

items.title_en: Jim Cramer: Here's the list of AI winners to buy for 2026 and beyond
items.title_zh: Jim Cramer：以下是 2026 年及以后值得购买的人工智能获奖者名单
items.desc_en: CNBC's Jim Cramer said the data center and artificial intelligence boom is spreading far beyond tech companies and into nearly every corner of the market.
items.desc_zh: CNBC 的吉姆·克莱默 (Jim Cramer) 表示，数据中心和人工智能的热潮正在远远超出科技公司范围，几乎蔓延到市场的每个角落。

items.title_en: Offensive stage of Iran war is over, US Secretary of State Rubio says
items.title_zh: 美国国务卿卢比奥表示伊朗战争进攻阶段已经结束
items.desc_en: As a spate of incidents in the Strait of Hormuz test the ceasefire, an Iranian official says, "We are just getting started".
items.desc_zh: 随着霍尔木兹海峡发生的一系列事件考验停火，一名伊朗官员表示，“我们才刚刚开始”。

items.title_zh: OpenAI 试验：布罗克曼反驳马斯克对初创公司历史的看法，讲述特斯拉的秘密工作

items.desc_zh: OpenAI 总裁格雷格·布罗克曼 (Greg Brockman) 于周二结束了他的证词，这家人工智能初创公司与埃隆·马斯克 (Elon Musk) 之间的重磅审判已进入第二周。

items.title_en: Super Micro stock jumps 19% on guidance beat as revenue more than doubles
items.title_zh: Super Micro 股价因收入增长一倍以上而上涨 19%
items.desc_en: Super Micro pointed to progress in U.S. manufacturing in issuing a stronger-than-expected quarterly forecast.
items.desc_zh: 超微发布强于预期的季度预测，指出美国制造业取得进展。

items.title_en: EV maker Lucid plans to adjust production, citing elevated vehicle inventories
items.title_zh: 电动汽车制造商 Lucid 计划以汽车库存增加为由调整产量
items.desc_en: Lucid Group said it will make moves to better align its production with customer demand for its luxury all-electric vehicles.
items.desc_zh: Lucid 集团表示，将采取措施更好地调整其生产，以满足客户对其豪华全电动汽车的需求。

items.title_en: AMD tops estimates for first quarter as data center revenue jumps 57%
items.title_zh: AMD 第一季度数据中心收入跃升 57%，超出预期
items.desc_en: AMD's earnings report lands as investors rush into the stock on optimism that the AI boom is just getting started.
items.desc_zh: AMD 的收益报告发布之际，投资者对人工智能热潮才刚刚开始感到乐观，纷纷涌入该股。

items.title_en: Small caps put on their best monthly showing since 2020. Bank of America says there's more upside ahead
items.title_zh: 小盘股创下 2020 年以来的最佳月度表现。美国银行表示未来还有更多上涨空间
items.desc_en: The Russell 2000 surged in April. Bank of America highlights ETFs to play small caps and enhance returns.
items.desc_zh: 罗素 2000 指数在 4 月份飙升。美国银行强调 ETF 可以发挥小盘股的作用并提高回报。

items.title_en: Data suggests 'hiring recession' may be behind us — but the Iran war poses job market risks
items.title_zh: 数据显示“招聘衰退”可能已经过去，但伊朗战争带来就业市场风险
items.desc_en: Hiring activity increased in March, according to federal data issued Tuesday. However, the Iran war threatens to stall that progress in the job market.
items.desc_zh: 根据周二发布的联邦数据，三月份招聘活动有所增加。然而，伊朗战争可能会阻碍就业市场的进展。

items.title_en: Nine coal miners die in gas explosion in Colombia
items.title_zh: 哥伦比亚煤矿瓦斯爆炸 9名矿工死亡
items.desc_en: The explosion is the latest accident in the locality of Sutatausa, the site of another deadly mine disaster in 2023.
items.desc_zh: 此次爆炸是苏塔陶萨 (Sutatausa) 地区发生的最新一起事故，这里曾于 2023 年发生过另一起致命矿难。

items.title_en: A 'fun' superstar stuns rivals and reshapes politics in an Indian state
items.title_zh: 一位“有趣”的超级巨星震惊对手并重塑印度一个邦的政治
items.desc_en: Film star Vijay has defied naysayers to almost sweep Tamil Nadu polls, marking a break in the political order.
items.desc_zh: 电影明星维杰不顾反对者的反对，几乎横扫泰米尔纳德邦民意调查，标志着政治秩序的突破。

items.title_en: Explosion at China fireworks factory kills 26 people
items.title_zh: 中国烟花爆竹厂爆炸已造成26人死亡
items.desc_en: A blast at a fireworks factory in Hunan province has killed 26 people and injured 61, state media report.
items.desc_zh: 据官方媒体报道，湖南省一家烟花厂发生爆炸，已造成 26 人死亡、61 人受伤。

items.title_en: Popular Australian author pleads guilty over child exploitation material
items.title_zh: 澳大利亚著名作家就剥削儿童内容认罪
items.desc_en: The Jasper Jones and Runt author was arrested in January during a police raid at his Perth home.
items.desc_zh: 《贾斯珀·琼斯与鲁特》的作者于一月份在警方突袭其位于珀斯的家中被捕。

items.title_en: Deadly China plane crash was caused by fuel cut-off, says report
items.title_zh: 报告称，致命的中国飞机失事是由于燃油切断造成的
items.desc_en: The Boeing 737 plane crashed into a Chinese hillside in 2022, killing all 132 people on board.
items.desc_zh: 2022年，波音737飞机坠入中国山坡，机上132人全部遇难。

items.title_en: Rescuers among three dead after yacht sinks off Australian coast
items.title_zh: 游艇在澳大利亚海岸沉没 救援人员三人死亡
items.desc_en: Volunteer rescuers aged 78 and 62 died after their boat rolled during "treacherous" conditions.
items.desc_zh: 78 岁和 62 岁的志愿者救援人员在他们的船在“危险”的条件下翻滚后死亡。

items.title_en: Two killed and many injured after car driven into crowd in German city of Leipzig
items.title_zh: 德国莱比锡市一辆汽车冲入人群，造成两人死亡、多人受伤
items.desc_en: Mayor Burkhard Jung said a suspect was detained and the motive was unclear.
items.desc_zh: 市长 Burkhard Jung 表示，一名嫌疑人已被拘留，动机尚不清楚。

items.desc_en: Turn your voice and screen into shareable videos instantly.
items.desc_zh: 立即将您的声音和屏幕变成可共享的视频。

items.title_en: Ukrainian drone hits upmarket Moscow high-rise ahead of Victory Day celebrations
items.title_zh: 乌克兰无人机在胜利日庆祝活动前袭击莫斯科高档高层建筑
items.desc_en: The attack comes as the Kremlin prepares to hold a scaled-back military parade on Saturday.
items.desc_zh: 此次袭击发生之际，克里姆林宫正准备在周六举行规模较小的阅兵式。

items.title_en: Oscars says AI actors, writing cannot win awards
items.title_zh: 奥斯卡称人工智能演员、编剧不能获奖
items.desc_en: The academy that controls the Oscars on Friday issued new award eligibility requirements around the use of artificial intelligence in film.
items.desc_zh: 周五，负责奥斯卡颁奖典礼的学院针对人工智能在电影中的使用发布了新的获奖资格要求。

items.title_en: Bright idea? UK firm pioneers data centres using lampposts
items.title_zh: 好主意？英国公司开创了使用灯柱的数据中心
items.desc_en: The solar-powered iLamps will have a built-in Nvidia chip but there are questions over their security and scalability.
items.desc_zh: 太阳能 iLamps 将内置 Nvidia 芯片，但其安全性和可扩展性存在问题。

items.title_en: Pentagon says US military to be an 'AI-first' fighting force
items.title_zh: 五角大楼表示美军将成为一支“人工智能优先”的战斗部队
items.desc_en: The US military has agreed eight new contracts with big tech firms as it expands its artificial intelligence capabilities.
items.desc_zh: 美国军方在扩大人工智能能力的同时，已与大型科技公司签订了八份新合同。

items.title_en: Elon Musk's latest Tesla pay valued at $158bn - but he can't pocket it
items.title_zh: 埃隆·马斯克（Elon Musk）最新的特斯拉薪酬价值 1580 亿美元 - 但他无法将其装进口袋
items.desc_en: Musk must meet a range of ambitious milestones at Tesla to justify the monster pay packet - so far he has not.
items.desc_zh: 马斯克必须在特斯拉实现一系列雄心勃勃的里程碑，才能证明巨额薪酬的合理性——到目前为止，他还没有做到。

items.title_en: PaceBar
items.title_zh: PaceBar
items.desc_en: A quiet pace instrument for your Mac
items.desc_zh: 适用于 Mac 的安静配速乐器

items.title_en: Spotify adds 'Verified' badges to distinguish human artists from AI
items.title_zh: Spotify 添加“已验证”徽章以区分人类艺术家和人工智能
items.desc_en: The music streaming platform will review criteria such as artists' live dates and social media presence.
items.desc_zh: 该音乐流媒体平台将审查艺术家的现场日期和社交媒体存在等标准。

items.title_zh: Intuned Agent

items.title_en: Will AI lead to more accurate opinion polls?
items.title_zh: 人工智能会带来更准确的民意调查吗？
items.desc_en: It's cheaper and faster to collect people's opinions using AI, but will it make polls more accurate?
items.desc_zh: 使用人工智能收集人们的意见更便宜、更快捷，但它会让民意调查更准确吗？

items.title_en: Apple hails 'extraordinary' iPhone demand as boss Tim Cook heads out
items.title_zh: 苹果公司老板蒂姆·库克离职后称赞 iPhone 需求“非凡”
items.desc_en: Cook is preparing to bow out after 15 years at the helm and hand over to John Ternus.
items.desc_zh: 库克准备在执掌公司 15 年后辞职，将权力移交给约翰·特努斯 (John Ternus)。

items.title_en: Twitch streamer hit by car live on camera - 'It felt like slow motion'
items.title_zh: Twitch 主播被车撞到镜头前直播 - “感觉就像慢动作”
items.desc_en: Isaiah Thomas, known as hmblzayy, was walking a 3,000-mile challenge when he was hit
items.desc_zh: 以赛亚·托马斯（Isaiah Thomas，又名 hmblzayy）在进行 3,000 英里挑战时被击中

items.desc_zh: 这家人工智能公司表示，与之前的模型错误不同，这个问题“悄然出现”。
